query:
-- Verificar preços de médicos para o responsável antigo (90001) na PACSML
SELECT bdp.*, u.username as doctor_name
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
JOIN users u ON u.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
WHERE bdp.financial_responsible_id = 90001 AND bdp.unit_id = 210001 AND bdp.ends_at IS NULL;

-- Verificar preços de médicos para o novo responsável (120001) na PACSML
SELECT bdp.*, u.username as doctor_name
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
JOIN users u ON u.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
WHERE bdp.financial_responsible_id = 120001 AND bdp.unit_id = 210001 AND bdp.ends_at IS NULL;
